name: multi-field-overlay-cascade-mismatch
description: Multi-Field scene with cascadeMismatch overlay enabled. Cells where cascade 0 (fine) reports no brick but cascade 1 (coarse) sees a thin-feature surface — a strong signal for sub-brick refinement candidates (JCGT 2022 NVIDIA cross-validation). Read from cascadeManager.getBrickMetaMirror() per cascade (Stage 1 of ADR 0014).
